queries.question: For every director, list information on roles they hire including corresponding fees.
queries.sql: select directors.name , additional_roles.role , additional_roles.fee from Directors_Roles join Additional_Roles on Directors_Roles.AdditionalRoleID = Additional_Roles.AdditionalRoleID join Directors on Directors_Roles.DirectorID = Directors.DirectorID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?role ?fee WHERE {
  ?directors_roles a :Directors_Roles .
  ?additional_roles a :Additional_Roles .
  ?directors_roles p:hasAdditional_Roles ?additional_roles .
  ?directors a :Directors .
  ?directors_roles p:hasDirectors ?directors .
  ?directors p:name ?name .
  ?additional_roles p:Role ?role .
  ?additional_roles p:Fee ?fee .
}

queries.question: Show me the roles each director has.
queries.sql: SELECT Additional_Roles.Role  from Directors_Roles join Additional_Roles on Directors_Roles.AdditionalRoleID = Additional_Roles.AdditionalRoleID join Directors on Directors_Roles.DirectorID = Directors.DirectorID   GROUP BY Directors_Roles.AdditionalRoleID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Directors_Roles.DirectorID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Directors)

queries.question: Show me the roles each director has.
queries.sql: select directors.name , additional_roles.role from Directors_Roles join Additional_Roles on Directors_Roles.AdditionalRoleID = Additional_Roles.AdditionalRoleID join Directors on Directors_Roles.DirectorID = Directors.DirectorID
queries.sparql:

queries.question: What fees are associated with each director's additional roles?
queries.sql: SELECT Additional_Roles.Fee  from Directors_Roles join Additional_Roles on Directors_Roles.AdditionalRoleID = Additional_Roles.AdditionalRoleID join Directors on Directors_Roles.DirectorID = Directors.DirectorID   GROUP BY Directors_Roles.AdditionalRoleID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Directors_Roles.DirectorID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Directors)

queries.question: What fees are associated with each director's additional roles?
queries.sql: select directors.name , additional_roles.fee from Directors_Roles join Additional_Roles on Directors_Roles.AdditionalRoleID = Additional_Roles.AdditionalRoleID join Directors on Directors_Roles.DirectorID = Directors.DirectorID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?fee WHERE {
  ?directors_roles a :Directors_Roles .
  ?additional_roles a :Additional_Roles .
  ?directors_roles p:hasAdditional_Roles ?additional_roles .
  ?directors a :Directors .
  ?directors_roles p:hasDirectors ?directors .
  ?directors p:name ?name .
  ?additional_roles p:Fee ?fee .
}

queries.question: Show me the roles and corresponding fees each director hires.
queries.sql: SELECT Additional_Roles.Role, Additional_Roles.Fee  from Directors_Roles join Additional_Roles on Directors_Roles.AdditionalRoleID = Additional_Roles.AdditionalRoleID join Directors on Directors_Roles.DirectorID = Directors.DirectorID   GROUP BY Directors_Roles.AdditionalRoleID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Directors_Roles.DirectorID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Directors)

Show me the roles each director has.
